name: First Progress Platinum Prestige Mastercard Secured
perks: 1% cash back on payments made to your account
Low ongoing purchase APR compared to most secured cards
Security deposit from $200 to $2,000 sets your credit limit
Reports to all three major credit bureaus monthly
No credit check required to apply
Accepted wherever Mastercard is accepted worldwide
Quick application and fast approval decision
drawbacks: Rewards paid on payments, not purchases (unusual structure)
No path to automatic upgrade to unsecured card
Lower credit limit ceiling than some competitors
No mobile app with advanced features
